use_cases: Hero section text enhancement for landing pages
Highlight call-to-action buttons with decorative sparkles
Product feature name emphasis in marketing materials
Premium/celebratory text animations for special offers
ai_summary: Animated sparkle text component that renders floating particle effects around text using framer-motion. Sparkles are randomly positioned, colored (purple/pink gradient by default), and have varying scales and lifespans for organic animation. Configurable via props for sparkle count and color palette. Used to add visual emphasis and delight to headings, CTAs, or key marketing copy.
